channel.title: Dan Patrick Show (Filtered)
channel.description: Daily DP Show episodes without C&R or Best Of clips.
channel.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – The Anatomy of a Superstar, Eli Manning
item.description:
DP and the Danettes can’t stop talking about Lionel Messi, what makes him great and which characteristics most superstar athletes tend to share. And 2x Super Bowl Champion Eli Manning joins the show and weighs in on today’s poll question: whose career would you rather have, Lionel Messi’s or Eli Manning’s?

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Messi or…, US Open
item.description:
Today’s poll question about Lionel Messi vs. Eli Manning takes over the show as DP, the Danettes and callers weigh in on whose career they’d rather have. Plus, Dan and the Danettes talk a little golf as the US Open gets underway tomorrow at Shinnecock Hills.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – World Cup Doesn’t Disappoint, Soccer G.O.A.T.
item.description:
The World Cup rolled into town with high expectations, and it may have exceeded those expectations yesterday as the biggest names in the sport delivered stellar performances, including a hat trick from Lionel Messi of Argentina. Dan is getting soccer fever, and he talks about Messi’s place as the G.O.A.T.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 –Crashing the Knicks Parade, Dan Wetzel
item.description:
Dan Wetzel joins Dan to discuss the heaviest drinking World Cup countries and the surprising resume of South Korea, why Brendan Sorsby’s agent told media that his client is being sued by Cincinnati, and why it’s taking so long for Nike to release Caitlin Clark’s shoe. Anthony and Rob from the Backroom Guys call from New York on the fringes of the Knicks parade, still trying to get a glimpse of the players.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Brendan Sorsby’s Agent Keeps Scandal Alive, Jon Wertheim
item.description:
Cincinnati has a lawsuit against former Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby, but the news came from Sorsby’s agent – Dan asks why even bring this up and continue to keep him in the blame game? Sports Illustrated senior writer Jon Wertheim joins Dan to discuss the Brendan Sorsby scandal fallout for sports gambling and college football, and the rise of young soccer star Lamine Yamal to worldwide prominence.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Meat Friday Cuban Style, World Cup Food Fun, Worst Song from Best Bands
item.description:
Dan shares his personal experience visiting Cuba after being served a Cubano sandwich during the show. Dan and the Danettes pick their least favorite songs from their most favorite bands. And Dylan quizzes the crew on World Cup teams and their respective national dishes.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Veterans Shine Early at US Open, Rebecca Lowe
item.description:
Shinnecock Hills has been notoriously difficult, but Dan watches those who are forged under fire shine through. Fox Sports World Cup host Rebecca Lowe stops by to talk about the chances for Team USA, why Cristiano Ronaldo might be holding back Portugal, and she’s forced to choose between Crystal Palace, USA and England championships.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Would You Rather… – World Cup Edition, Knicks Parade Mix-up
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes consider whether they’d rather see the US Men’s National Team win a World Cup or see their favorite team win a championship. And DP lambasts the Knicks parade organizers for disrespecting Patrick Ewing with a banner incorrectly assigning his retired number 33 to a rando from the bottom of the Knicks roster.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Jay Bilas, NFL Offseason Heating Up
item.description:
Hoops insider Jay Bilas joins the show to preview tomorrow’s NBA Draft. And DP takes a detour back to the NFL as offseason signings are heating up and teams are solidifying their rosters.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – Giannis Antetokounmpo Trade Rumors, Chris Fowler
item.description:
Dan addresses reports that Giannis Antetokounmpo will be traded, likely to Boston or Miami, before the NBA Draft tomorrow night. And longtime broadcaster and friend of the show, Chris Fowler drops by to share a touching story about Father’s Day.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Wyndham Clark Wins US Open, Seton O’Connor
item.description:
Dan was embarrassed for the gallery at the US Open at Shinnecock Hills after they were clearly rooting against Wyndham Clark while he was busy leading the tournament wire-to-wire. And semi-retired Danette Seton O’Connor makes a return to break down the World Cup and the US Men’s National Team’s strong showing so far and their improving odds.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Adam Silver, Waiting for Roger
item.description:
NBA Commissioner Adam Silver stops by from the Barclays Center in Brooklyn where the NBA Draft will get underway tonight. And Dan and the Danettes wonder why NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell continues to snub the show.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – NBA Draft, Wyndham Clark
item.description:
Dan and the Danettes talk about tonight’s NBA Draft and how Dusty May’s new job as head coach in Dallas and Giannis Antetokounmpo’s trade to Miami will affect the outcome. And US Open Champion Wyndham Clark joins the show to celebrate his second US Open trophy and talk about playing at Shinnecock Hills with an antagonistic gallery.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – Pat Riley Got His Man. Vincent Goodwill
item.description:
DP and the Danettes dissect the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade from all angles and consider the future of each team that was involved (or not involved) in the pursuit of the Greek Freak. And NBA insider Vincent Goodwill drops by to weigh in on what this trade means for the entire NBA.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Mike Florio, Seth Greenberg
item.description:
NFL Insider Mike Florio drops by to explain the whole Brendan Sorsby saga and the NFL cancelling the supplemental draft, as well as the chances of a work stoppage for the league. Plus, former NCAA men’s basketball head coach and current analyst, Seth Greenberg joins the show to share his impressions of last night’s NBA Draft.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – A Solution for Sorsby, Tim MacMahon
item.description:
After the NFL cancelled its supplemental draft leaving Brendan Sorsby out to dry, DP has some advice for the embattled QB as he tries to salvage his career. And NBA insider Tim MacMahon stops by to recap last night’s NBA Draft action.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – NBA Draft, Name Dropping
item.description:
Dan reacts to the first round of the NBA Draft last night and thinks Cameron Boozer is giving “Mary Ann” energy. Plus, DP dives into his contacts and flexes about which celebrities he maintains text conversations with.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Slim Pickings in the 2nd Round of the NBA Draft, Stacey Dales
item.description:
Dan talks about the lack of depth that comes in the second round of the NBA Draft: for every Nikola Jokić and Jalen Brunson story, there are a lot more guys who end up in the G-League. Former WNBA All-Star and sports reporter Stacey Dales joins Dan to discuss the ongoing controversy surrounding Caitlin Clark – why she gets officiated differently, why she was excluded from the WNBA 30th Anniversary commemorative poster, and the animosity toward her from the rest of the league.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – LaMelo to Minnesota, Eric Wynalda
item.description:
Dan reacts to the trade that’s partnered LaMelo Ball with Anthony Edwards in Minnesota. And former USMNT star Eric Wynalda stops by to talk about the World Cup, the greatness of Lionel Messi, and how far Team USA can go as they prepare to take on Turkiye.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – WNBA Snubs Caitlin Clark, Chris Mannix
item.description:
The WNBA leaves Clark off their anniversary poster and Dan thinks this league can’t stop getting in its way when it comes to their most popular player. The NBA pulls off an NFL move with big trades after the draft and Sports Illustrated senior writer Chris Mannix joins Dan to talk about those blockbuster trades, how close Boston was to getting Giannis Antetokounmpo and if they will trade Jaylen Brown.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3 – Pochettino Spars with the Media, Linda Cohn
item.description:
USA soccer coach Mauricio Pochettino reminds the media that they won the group stage, and Dan wonders if there’s a culture divide on how sports coverage works over here. ESPN host Linda Cohn joins Dan to discuss her final night at SportsCenter and all her memories through the years around the Mothership as she prepares to say farewell after 34 years.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2 – WNBA Suspends Alyssa Thomas, Alan Hunter
item.description:
The WNBA stepped up amidst public outcry and suspended Alyssa Thomas for her uncalled flagrant foul on Caitlin Clark. SiriusXM host and former VJ, Alan Hunter talks about memories from the height of MTV’s popularity and leads a discussion on the greatest American band of all time and where The Grateful Dead land on the list.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1 – USMNT Has Good Problems, Caitlin Controversy, Taylor Twellman
item.description:
The US Men’s National Team dropped the final game of their World Cup group stage to Türkiye and DP explains to the uninitiated why that’s a good problem to have. The WNBA situation around Caitlin Clark continues, including the poster, and Dan wants someone at the WNBA to answer his calls. And soccer commentator Taylor Twellman answers questions about Team USA as they fall in the final seconds to Türkiye, plus the back-and-forth highlights from Kylian Mbappe and Erling Haaland.

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: WNBA Vs Caitlin Clark & The Crowning Of Arch Manning
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington bring up the drama relating to Caitlin Clark being targeted in the WNBA again and how the league seemingly is more hands off on the situation. Plus, the guys discuss Archie Manning's disappointment on his grandson Arch being crowned before he even played, Chris Johnson's awful ailment, and more!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: No CFL For Sorsby & NBA Rumors Brewing!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington go into depth on the news that the CFL will not have Brendan Sorsby in their league die to his past gambling situation plaguing him. Plus the guys discuss the latest NBA rumors brewing such as the Warriors pursuing LeBron James with some other moves, we have another edition of the FSR IR, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Travelers Championship Finish & WR Rants!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they react to the end of the Travelers Championship with Viktor Havland beating Scottie Scheffler in the Sudden Death round to win it all. Plus, the guys hear the latest rant from Brandon Aiyuk as he shades his former agent and John Lynch, we have a OJ Simpson edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 3: Pete Prisco Joins!
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington chat with Pete Prisco as they ask him about the implications relating to Brendan Sorsby waiting a year to get drafted and the NFL Top 100 list. Plus, the guys talk more about Malik Beasley's gambling charges, we hear about some of the funny antics in the World Cup from fans pranking each, and much more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 2: New Scenery For Ja Morant
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington discuss the Ja Morant trade to the Trailblazers the other day and wonder if this change of scenery will be enough to recapture the magic he once had. Plus, the guys wonder about the bid for the Seahawks and who are the candidates to buy the team, we have another edition of What Are We Watching, and more!!

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick

item.title: Hour 1: Diana Russini's Ticket Footage
item.description:
Jonas Knox, Brady Quinn, & LaVar Arrington fill in for the Dan Patrick Show as they hear from the Diana Russini body cam footage for when she was ticketed earlier in the year. Plus, the guys go over some World Cup upsets such as Paraguay knocking out Germany, we have a Jake Paul edition of ICYMI, and much more! 

See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.
item.itunes:author: Dan Patrick
